name: Barbecued Lamb Chops
recipeInstructions:
Arrange the lamb chops in a large glass baking pan. Combine the melted butter and wine; crush the Bouquet Garni and add it to the mixture. Pour over the lamb chops and marinate at room temperature for several hours.
Drain the chops and barbecue them for about 30 minutes, turning several times and basting frequently with the remaining marinade. Season to taste with salt and pepper.
Source: Spice Islands Cookbook, 1967
